baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI amplified ×3 at T3. Geologist CEO raises to ×4 per updated CEO ability. Geologist CEO: FORESIGHT allows peeking 2 cards ahead and swapping the top 2. Non-Geologist: once per year, look at the top global event card and choose to keep or move it (as standard, but no swap).

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Geologist CEO: FORESIGHT allows peeking 2 cards ahead and swapping the top 2. Non-Geologist: once per year, look at the top global event card and choose to keep or move it (as standard, but no swap). GMI ×3 baseline for all players. Geologist CEO raises to ×4 per updated CEO ability.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap for each MFG asset you own (max +3).

flavourText: Petrochemicals built the twentieth century. The twenty-first just pretends otherwise.
